articles.title: Acme Corp to Acquire Widget Ltd in $12 Billion Deal
articles.description: Acme Corp has announced a definitive agreement to acquire Widget Ltd for $12 billion in cash and stock.
articles.content: Acme Corp announced today that it will buy Widget Ltd in a mega-merger valued at $12 billion. The acquisition will allow Acme to expand its market share in manufacturing widgets. The board of directors of both companies have approved the deal.

articles.title: Widget Ltd Bought by Acme Corp for $12B
articles.description: Widget Ltd has agreed to be acquired by Acme Corp in a deal valued at $12 billion.
articles.content: Widget Ltd shares surged after Acme Corp announced it will buy the company for $12 billion. Analysts expect the deal to close by the third quarter of 2026.
